accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately describe the War Powers Resolution context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the summary faithfully tracks the bill's contents.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly references the expedited procedure under 50 U.S.C. 1546a and the War Powers Resolution invoked by the bill.

exceptions_conditions.why: Thoroughly covers the rule-of-construction carve-outs and the war-declaration/authorization condition.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective date; the summary correctly notes this.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the removal directive and all four rule-of-construction exceptions.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and non-partisan throughout, including factual reporting of findings.

concise.why: Free of padding and filler while remaining complete.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the War Powers Resolution, 50 U.S.C. 1546a, Iran, Israel, and named officials.

correct_figures.why: The April 10, 2026 casualty date is stated correctly and consistent with the bill.
